failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, so the agent could not obtain the catalog evidence needed to answer the price question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan matched the user request: retrieve the price using ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the expected arguments. The failure was caused by an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. There is no evidence later in the trajectory that the timeout was resolved or retried successfully.
